name: open-agent-teams
description: Open-Agent-Teams：Agent Teams 协同抽象框架与 Hermes 集成基座（pnpm 多包工作区）

scripts.build: pnpm --filter @open-agent-teams/core run build && pnpm --filter @open-agent-teams/gateway run build && pnpm --filter @open-agent-teams/glue-service run build
scripts.check: pnpm --filter @open-agent-teams/core run check && pnpm --filter @open-agent-teams/gateway run typecheck && pnpm --filter @open-agent-teams/dashboard run build
scripts.framework:pack: pnpm --filter @open-agent-teams/core pack --pack-destination ../../dist-packages && pnpm --filter @open-agent-teams/gateway pack --pack-destination ../../dist-packages && pnpm --filter @open-agent-teams/glue-service pack --pack-destination ../../dist-packages
